params.Description: Descend 4 — As long as there are four or more permanent cards in your graveyard, CARDNAME gets +2/+2 and has trample.
Descend 8 — As long as there are eight or more permanent cards in your graveyard, NICKNAME gets an additional +2/+2 and can't be blocked by more than one creature.
